response.text:
# REFLECTION

Household r2c0 is in critical survival mode with SoC at 22.5% (8.78/39 kWh) while islanded with a 1 kW load, yielding approximately 8.8 hours of autonomy before depletion. The memory log reveals a cluster-wide energy scarcity cascade where all peers (r2c1, r1c0, r3c0) are simultaneously rejecting outbound shares and requesting inbound aid, each citing their own critical SoC thresholds. r3c0 has explicitly distrusted r2c0 while suggesting r4c0 as a reciprocal unlock partner in distress (10% SoC). The pattern indicates that r2c0 must immediately pivot from a defensive posture to a strategic micro-share with r4c0 to break the deadlock and unlock inbound aid before cluster-wide cascade collapse. Continuing to hoard energy while all peers reject sharing will result in isolated depletion; a small sacrifice to r4c0 (the only suggested reciprocal ally) offers the only viable path to inbound recovery and cluster stabilization.

```yaml
sharing_intent: generous
share_min_soc_frac: 0.20
max_share_kw_per_tick: 0.25
recipient_priority:
  - circle: r4c0
    weight: 1.0
distrusted_peers:
  - r3c0
request_urgency: urgent
belief_note: "Cluster-wide scarcity cascade detected. All peers rejecting outbound shares. r3c0 distrusted; r4c0 identified as reciprocal unlock partner in critical distress (10% SoC). Micro-share strategy: sacrifice 0.25 kW to r4c0 to break deadlock and unlock inbound aid before imminent depletion (8.8h autonomy). Resume normal sharing only after SoC recovery above 50%."
ttl_ticks: 4
```

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).
